title: paederia linearis var. pilosa
intro: Paederia linearis var. pilosa, also known as the hairy stem bengkong or hairy stem paederia, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Paederia linearis var. pilosa include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. In herbal preparations, Paederia linearis var. pilosa can be consumed as a tea or used in decoctions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
